name: sendMessage
_note: Sends a direct/group/broadcast message into per-user STATE keyed by ctx.actor.userId. STATE-backed (NEVER no_db). Empty body fails-closed. With no 'to', defaults to broadcast → delivered (queued:false). A direct message to an offline/unknown node is queued into the store-and-forward queue (queued:true). The assassin's owner actor send to 'broadcast' delivers immediately.
